name: motion.md
description: Runtime-neutral MOTION.md specification and reference tooling

scripts.check: npm run test && node packages/cli/bin/motionmd.mjs lint examples/minimal/MOTION.md && node packages/cli/bin/motionmd.mjs lint examples/expressive/MOTION.md && node packages/cli/bin/motionmd.mjs lint examples/procedural/MOTION.md && node packages/cli/bin/motionmd.mjs lint examples/reduced-motion/MOTION.md
